entries.title: Pre-existing flaky test auth::tests::get_returns_none_for_unknown_creator
entries.closure_note: Migrated to use testutil::isolated_home() RAII guard. Test now passes with --test-threads=2.
entries.closure_evidence: commit ae22c2f..42a6e3f; cargo test -p nexus42 -- --test-threads=2: 539 passed, 0 failed

entries.title: config::tests::migration_converts_json_to_toml flaky under parallel test execution
entries.source: QA report — HOME env race condition between parallel tests
entries.closure_note: Migrated to use testutil::isolated_home() RAII guard. All 8 config tests now pass with --test-threads=2.
entries.closure_evidence: commit c535636; cargo test -p nexus42 -- --test-threads=2: 539 passed, 0 failed

entries.title: Corrupt index.json silently discarded on next add (best-effort recovery only)
entries.source: QA report — atomic write mitigates but corrupt file on disk is unrecoverable
entries.closure_note: Added corrupt index.json detection with eprintln warning to user suggesting deletion or re-add.
entries.closure_evidence: commit f1899e9; unit test verifies warning on corrupt JSON

entries.title: Entry ID collision guard absent (millis+diversifier reduces but doesn't eliminate risk)
entries.source: QA report — collision detection not enforced at write time
entries.closure_note: Added collision guard that checks existing index IDs and appends counter suffix on collision.
entries.closure_evidence: commit d4dfb9b; unit test proves collision rejection

entries.title: Test flakiness under --test-threads>1 due to HOME env manipulation on macOS
entries.closure_note: Migrated all 6 HOME-manipulating tests to testutil::isolated_home() RAII guard with global mutex.
entries.closure_evidence: commit c5e50c6; cargo test -p nexus42 -- creator_identity passes with --test-threads=2

entries.title: RMW race on creator-identities.json under concurrent CLI invocations (no file locking)
entries.closure_note: Added advisory file lock using .lock file with create_new. Concurrent write test passes.

entries.title: creator_auth_headers() does not validate creator_id input at entry point
entries.closure_note: Added creator_id validation rejecting empty/whitespace input. 3 unit tests added.

entries.title: Trace files grow unbounded — no rotation, size limits, or TTL cleanup
entries.closure_note: Added 10MB file size limit with truncation guard on write.

entries.title: Per-event file open/close overhead on hot path
entries.closure_note: Refactored to buffered singleton TraceWriter with Mutex. Single file open per process.
entries.closure_evidence: commit f129b0c; trace writer test verifies single open

entries.title: Concurrent writes to same trace file risk interleaved bytes
entries.closure_note: Mutex serialization in TraceWriter prevents interleaved bytes within single process.
entries.closure_evidence: commit f129b0c; trace writer test passes

entries.title: Best-effort I/O errors lack structured observability (eprintln swallowed)
entries.closure_note: Replaced all eprintln! with tracing::warn! in acp_trace.rs.
entries.closure_evidence: commit f85e659; rg eprintln returns 0 matches
